title: JWT-encoded off-chain session token for verified handshakes
description: Define a compact JWT profile (draft-bolyra-session-token) that encodes the verified handshake result — humanNullifier, agentNullifier, scopeCommitment, sessionNonce, and verification timestamp — as a signed JWT. This lets relying parties consume Bolyra handshake results without on-chain queries, using standard JWT libraries. The spec should define registered claims mapping, a `bolyra+jwt` media type, and an `x5c`-style proof-of-verification header pointing to the on-chain tx hash. Aligns with OAuth 2.0 DPoP (RFC 9449) binding semantics for the nonce field.
